finding: P8 M1.5 calc_brier.py implemented: compute_brier / compute_log_loss / compute_brier_multiclass / build_settlement_record / aggregate_scores. 17/17 unit tests GREEN. CLI accepts --input/--output/--aggregate-output. Resolves roadmap §7 必做修复 #1 (Python auto-computation function did not exist).

P8 M1.5 closes the Brier/Log Loss gap relative to task_spec §Known Gaps. M4 (knowledge writeback) and M5 (cross-domain) can now use auto-computed scores; manual values in YAML are deprecated for any new runs.

P8 M1 attempted to parse cds4polymarket ab-test/analysis/ab_test_17rounds_data.xlsx to find Brier-able prediction rows. RESULT: xlsx contains 9 sheets (absolute_scores, pairwise_results, mrp_results, experiment_metadata, etc.) but ALL rows are judge scores (discrete integers 1-5, or winner labels A/B/tie) — NOT continuous prediction probabilities in [0,1] needed by calc_brier.compute_brier.

P8 Brier cannot be computed on existing AB-test judge scores. M1 (per task_spec) requires either: (a) extending cds4polymarket to record continuous prediction_p alongside judge scores, OR (b) running a new prediction_round with a numeric-forecast prompt. Both are out of single-session scope.
calc_brier.py (just implemented M1.5) is READY for any future round that emits {predicted_p, observed_outcome} rows. The gap is upstream (data shape), not downstream (computation).

P8 M1.5 5-persona review: median=5.0, sorted [4,5,5,6,6]. PIT-107 satisfied (5 distinct model_ids). Methodology-scaffolding threshold=5.0; verdict=research_grade_acceptable. Keep calc_brier.py as paper-scoped tool; document known limitations.

Reviewer R4 (deepseek-v4-flash) again named the data-shape mismatch as binding weakness: 'Assumes continuous probabilities but existing data uses discrete judge scores, reducing practical utility.' Cross-confirms the M1 stale trigger with reviewer-validated critique.

Reviewers R2 (kimi-k2.5) and R5 (qwen3.5-122b-a10b) both noted the 0.7/0.3 factor_update heuristic threshold lacks probabilistic justification. Honest critique; current heuristic is v0 only (per checkpoint-stable-decisions A.6).
